title: erysimum hieraciifolium subsp. cheiriflorum
intro: Erysimum hieraciifolium subsp. cheiriflorum, also known as cheiranthus, is a plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of cheiranthus include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and promote relaxation. Cheiranthus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
